name: EcoSystem - Unified Environmental Web Portal of Ukraine
operator: Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources of Ukraine (MEPR)
dataType: Air quality, water quality, radiation, waste, nature reserves, EIA registry, pollutant emissions
description: Unified national ecological platform integrated with Diia, providing 66 open environmental data registers, nature reserve cadastre, pollutant transfer registry, and the EcoZagroza real-time environmental alerts app.

name: SaveEcoBot - Environmental Monitoring System
operator: SaveEcoBot (NGO / civic tech)
dataType: Air quality index, background radiation, active fires, environmental permits, EIA data
description: Independent civic environmental monitoring system aggregating 500+ air quality and radiation stations across Ukraine with public API access for permits, EIA registry, AQI and radiation data.

name: State Agency of Water Resources - Geoportal and E-Services
operator: State Agency of Water Resources of Ukraine (Derzhvodahentstvo)
dataType: Water use permits, basin management, irrigation, drainage, river monitoring, water cadastre
description: National water resources management portal with e-services for special water use permits, a geoportal at geoportal.davr.gov.ua, and basin-level monitoring for surface water, irrigation and drainage systems.

name: State Forest Resources Agency - Forest Map of Ukraine
operator: State Forest Resources Agency of Ukraine (SFRA)
dataType: Forest cover, species composition, forest management units, protected forest areas
description: Interactive forest map of Ukraine covering 73% of national forests under SFRA management, with regional forestry geoportals providing compartment-level data on species, age and forest management.

name: State Emergency Service of Ukraine - Hazard and Risk Data
operator: State Emergency Service of Ukraine (DSNS)
dataType: Emergency incidents, flood risk maps, man-made and natural hazards, fire hazard, civil protection
description: National emergency service portal providing real-time hazard information, historical emergency incident data, flood and fire risk maps, and civil protection guidance across all Ukrainian oblasts.

name: Agromonitoring Geoportal of Ukraine
operator: Space Research Institute NASU-SSAU
dataType: NDVI, VHI, EVI vegetation indices, crop area estimates, satellite-based crop maps
description: Satellite-based agricultural monitoring geoportal operated by the Space Research Institute of NASU, providing NDVI/VHI/EVI vegetation indices and crop area estimates from MODIS and Landsat imagery for all of Ukraine.

name: State Hydrographic Service of Ukraine - Nautical Charts and Data
operator: State Hydrographic Service of Ukraine (SHSU)
dataType: Nautical charts, electronic navigational charts (ENC), river navigation charts, oceanographic atlas, bathymetry
cost: partially free (catalogues free; chart purchases apply)
formats: PDF, S-57 ENC cells, print charts
description: Official hydrographic service providing nautical and river navigation charts, S-57 electronic navigational charts, oceanographic atlas, and Notices to Mariners for Black Sea and Sea of Azov waters under Ukrainian responsibility.

name: World Data Center for Geoinformatics and Sustainable Development (WDC-Ukraine)
operator: Igor Sikorsky Kyiv Polytechnic Institute / NASU
dataType: Geoinformatics, Earth sciences, sustainable development indicators, national atlas layers
description: Ukrainian branch of the ISC World Data System collecting and disseminating geospatial and Earth science datasets, including the National Atlas of Ukraine layers and sustainable development analytical reports.

name: National Environmental Monitoring System of Belarus (NSMOS)
operator: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environmental Protection of Belarus
dataType: Air quality, surface water, groundwater, soils, radiation, biodiversity, land use
description: Belarus national environmental monitoring system established in 1993, integrating 11 independent monitoring types with data on air, water, soils, radiation and biodiversity, accessible via annual analytical reviews and quarterly reports.

name: Belgidromet Automated Radiation Monitoring Network
operator: Republican Center for Hydrometeorology (Belgidromet)
dataType: Gamma dose rate, atmospheric radionuclides, soil contamination, real-time radiation data
description: Automated radiation monitoring network of 32 stations operated by Belgidromet, providing real-time 10-minute gamma dose rate data covering Chernobyl-affected zones and the Belarusian NPP influence area.

name: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environmental Protection of Belarus
operator: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environmental Protection (Minprirody)
dataType: Environmental regulations, protected areas registry, EIA, waste management, water cadastre data
description: Central environmental authority of Belarus providing access to protected areas registry, state water cadastre statistics, environmental impact assessment data, and analytical control results for environmental protection.

name: Ministry of Forestry of Belarus - Forest Resources GIS
operator: Ministry of Forestry of the Republic of Belarus
dataType: Forest fund inventory, stand-level data, species composition, forest enterprise boundaries
formats: GIS Forest Resources system, internal database
description: Belarus forestry management system maintaining 3+ million subcompartment records in the GIS Forest Resources database, with 15-year stand-level inventory cycles covering species composition, age classes and forest enterprise boundaries.

name: Belstat Geostatistics Portal
operator: National Statistical Committee of the Republic of Belarus (Belstat)
dataType: Population census data, demographic statistics, economic indicators, spatially referenced official statistics
description: Belstat geostatistics information-analytical system providing interactive map-based access to official statistical data including population census results, demographics, and socioeconomic indicators at administrative unit level.

name: GISmap.by - Land Information System Geoportal
operator: National Cadastral Agency / State Committee on Property
dataType: Orthophotos, cadastral parcels, land use, administrative boundaries, territorial planning
description: National land information system geoportal of Belarus providing interactive access to orthophoto mosaics, cadastral parcel boundaries, land use data, construction monitoring and territorial planning documents.

name: Belstat Shared Environmental Information System (SEIS) Indicators
operator: National Statistical Committee of Belarus / Ministry of Natural Resources
dataType: Air pollution statistics, water use, waste generation, biodiversity indicators, protected areas
description: Belarus environmental statistics under the UNECE/EEA Shared Environmental Information System framework, providing standardised indicators on air quality, water use, waste, biodiversity and protected species at national and regional levels.

name: Agency Moldsilva - Forest Resources of Moldova
operator: Agency Moldsilva
dataType: Forest cover, species composition, nursery data, biodiversity, seed sources, protected forest areas
description: Central forestry authority of Moldova managing national forest inventory data, nursery and seed source records, biodiversity assessments, and protected forest area information across the national forest fund.

name: Geofond AGRM - Moldova Geological Spatial Data Platform
operator: Agency of Geology and Mineral Resources (AGRM)
dataType: Geological maps, mineral resources, borehole data, hydrogeology, subsoil information
formats: GeoNode layers, Shapefile, GeoJSON, web maps
description: GeoNode-based geological spatial data platform operated by the Agency of Geology and Mineral Resources, providing geological maps, mineral resource locations, hydrogeological data and subsoil information for Moldova.

name: Apele Moldovei - Water Resources Agency
operator: Agency Apele Moldovei (Ministry of Environment)
dataType: Water use permits, abstraction volumes, flood protection, irrigation systems, river basin data
description: National water management agency responsible for flood protection, irrigation infrastructure, river basin management and water use permitting, providing water statistics datasets to the National Bureau of Statistics.

name: Environmental Agency of Moldova - Air and Water Quality Monitoring
operator: Environmental Agency (Agentia de Mediu), Ministry of Environment
dataType: Air quality (PM10, NOx, SO2, O3, CO), surface water quality, soil monitoring, environmental radioactivity
description: Moldova Environmental Agency operating a network of 17 stationary air quality posts and one automated station, publishing daily air quality bulletins and monthly environmental quality reports covering air, water, soil and radioactivity.

name: Moldova Open Data Portal (date.gov.md)
operator: e-Government Agency of Moldova
dataType: Government datasets across health, education, economy, transport, environment, culture
description: National open data portal providing access to 1,274+ government datasets and 16,300 informational resources across health, education, economy, transport, environment and culture from public institutions.

name: Moldova Cadastre Online Services
operator: Agency for Geodesy, Cartography and Cadastre (AGCC)
dataType: Real estate cadastre, land parcel boundaries, property registration, valuation data
cost: partially free (basic info free; detailed extracts paid)
description: National online cadastral services portal providing country-wide digital access to immovable property data, land parcel boundaries, ownership records, and real estate valuation since full digital rollout in 2023.

name: National Bureau of Statistics - Statistical Geoportal (Moldova)
operator: National Bureau of Statistics of the Republic of Moldova
dataType: Population census geodata, demographic indicators, regional statistics, socioeconomic data
formats: StatBank tables, CSV, XLS, interactive maps
description: Moldova statistical bureau developing a statistical geoportal with map-based access to census and demographic data at raion and locality levels, supported by EU-funded FieldMapstat digital mapping infrastructure.
